---
name: 🔬 Research
about: Propose or document a research investigation (experiment, spike, exploration)
title: "[Research] "
labels: ["research", "experiment"]
assignees: []
---

## Research Question

<!-- One sentence: what do we want to learn? -->

## Hypothesis

<!-- Optional. What do we expect to find? -->

## Why Now

<!-- Why is this research important at this moment? -->

## Method

<!-- How will we investigate? Spike, prototype, benchmark, reading, etc. -->

## Time-box

<!-- Maximum time / effort. -->

## Expected Output

<!-- Where will findings be recorded?
     `.cognition/researcher/research_notes.md` or `knowledge/features/`. -->

## Success Criteria

<!-- What would constitute a useful result? -->

## Failure Criteria

<!-- What would mean "stop, this is not worth continuing"? -->

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Research executed (or stopped early with reason)
- [ ] Findings recorded in `.cognition/researcher/research_notes.md`
- [ ] If promising, follow-up issue or ADR proposed
- [ ] Lessons learned added (`.cognition/curator/lessons_learned.md`)

/label ~"research"
